roa.docketEntryComment: SPN INT SW-BENVENUTO/C;CRT REJECTS PLEA BECAUSE OF DEFT'S 2NEW CASESSPN INT SW-BENVENUTTO/C;CRT REJECTS PLEA BECAUSE OF DEFT'S 2 NEW CASESPLEA G S/A&REMAND TO MUNI CRT D12-12/22/93 9AM FOR FUR PROC&JOIN NEW CASEPLEA G S/A;REMAND TO MUNI CRT D12-12/22/93 9AM FOR FUR PROC&JOIN NEW CASENG PLEA REIN & ANY DISM CTS OR STRKN ALLEGS ARE REIN;BAIL SET $50,000NG PLEA ENT'D & ANY DISM CTS OR STRKN ALLEGS ARE REIN;BAIL SET $50,000
SPN INT SW-BANCROFT/K;CONT 2/2/94 AT 9AM IN S21 FOR CERT PLEA G MUNI/SENT
CT REJ DISPO,DEF HAS 2 NEW CSES,G PL S/AS & NG PL REIN,DISM CTS REIN
CT REJ DISPO,DEF HAS 2 NEW CSES,G PL S/AS & NG PL REIN,DISM CTS REIN

CT ORDERS CLERK TO COLLECT BAIL-GRTD

BX $3500(SB93851) BAIL RESET $10,000(SB93874) BY JDG MEEKS
